account_email_locked_hint: Your email address is your sign-in and can't be changed.
account_passkeys_description: With a passkey you sign in right away with Face ID, Touch ID or a security key — without waiting for an email. Add one passkey per device you use.
account_passkeys_empty_description: Add a passkey to sign in faster next time.
account_profile_description: Update your name and phone number.
avatar_error_too_large: The image is too large (max 5 MB)
avatar_error_unsupported_format: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC
avatar_format_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF or HEIC. Max 5 MB.
bin_empty_description: Deleted folders and documents end up here.
bin_folder_purged_toast: The folder and its contents were permanently deleted
bin_page_description: Deleted folders and documents. Restore them, or delete them permanently.
bin_purge_confirm_description: The file is removed for good and can't be restored. Its history is kept.
bin_purge_folder_confirm_description: The folder, all its subfolders, and the documents inside them are removed for good and can't be restored. Their history is kept.
booking_arrange_hint: Click a block to move or swap
booking_arrange_selected_hint: Swap {block} — pick another block · Esc cancels
booking_error_generic: Something went wrong with the booking
booking_helper_owner: Click a block you'd like to trade to
booking_lock_confirm_body: Everyone sees their final weeks immediately. You can unlock again later.
booking_suggestion_summary: The suggestion satisfies {satisfied} of {total} trade wishes
booking_suggestion_wish_unmet_sr: Trade wish for {share} is not fulfilled
booking_unlock_confirm_body: The schedule is hidden and the wish round reopens.
cmd_description: Search or jump to a page, folder, or document.
cmd_kw_account: account settings profile passkeys sign in
document_delete_description_multi: The documents move to the bin. An administrator can restore them from there.
document_delete_description_single: The document moves to the bin. An administrator can restore it from there.
document_delete_items_description: Selected files move to the bin. Selected folders are deleted with all their contents – subfolders and documents. An administrator can restore it all from there.
document_deleted_multi_toast: {count} documents were deleted (an admin can restore them)
document_deleted_single_toast: The document was deleted (an admin can restore it)
document_empty_description: Upload manuals, insurance papers or other documentation – drag files in or use the button above.
document_error_delete_others: You can only delete your own documents
document_error_edit_others: You can only edit your own documents
document_folder_empty_description: Upload documents or create a subfolder to fill it up.
document_items_deleted_toast: Deleted ({folders} folders, {documents} documents) – an admin can restore them
document_move_into_selected_error: Can't move into a selected folder
document_page_description_desktop: A shared library for the boat's co-owners. Drag documents between folders or upload new ones.
document_page_description_mobile: A shared library for the boat's co-owners. Tap to open, press and hold to select.
document_rename_description_extension: Change the name. The file extension can't be changed.
email_invite_body: Hi! You've been invited to Oceanview. Click the button below to get started. The link is valid for 7 days.
email_invite_fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
email_invite_ignore: If you weren't expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.
email_invite_preview: You've been invited to Oceanview. Accept to get started.
email_magiclink_body: Hi! Click the button below to sign in. The link is valid for 5 minutes.
email_magiclink_fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
email_magiclink_ignore: If you didn't request this email, you can safely ignore it.
email_magiclink_preview: Use the link to sign in. Valid for 5 minutes.
file_error_not_in_storage: The file wasn't found in storage
folder_create_description: Create a folder here to organize documents.
folder_delete_description: The folder and everything in it – subfolders and documents – moves to the bin. An administrator can restore it from there.
folder_deleted_toast: The folder was deleted ({folders} folders, {documents} documents)
folder_error_move_into_descendant: You can't move a folder into itself or a subfolder
folder_error_name_taken: A folder with that name already exists here
folder_error_not_deleted: The folder isn't in the bin
folder_error_parent_deleted: The parent folder is deleted — restore it first
image_error_not_yours: The profile picture doesn't belong to you
login_description: Sign in with a passkey or a link to your email.
login_sent_description: The sign-in link is on its way.
login_sent_instructions: Check your inbox (or the server log for now) and follow the link to continue.
login_sent_to: We've sent a sign-in link to
login_signed_in_body: You can close this tab and go back to your other tab — or continue here.
login_switch_user: Sign in as a different user
login_unknown_email_error: No account exists for this email address. Contact an administrator to be added.
meta_account_description: Manage your account and your passkeys
meta_bin_description: Restore or delete removed documents and folders
meta_documents_description: Shared documents for the boat's co-owners
meta_owners_description: Owners in Oceanview – contact details and shares
meta_root_description: Internal tool for Oceanview's boat owners.
notfound_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
onboarding_avatar_description: A picture makes it easier for the others to recognize you. Optional.
onboarding_name_description: Your name is shown in the contact list for the other owners.
onboarding_phone_description: So the other owners can reach you easily. Optional.
owners_description: Contact details and shares for the owners in Oceanview.
owners_empty_deleted_description: No owner has signed off – the whole crew is still aboard.
passkey_added: Passkey added. Next time you'll sign in right away.
passkey_delete_description: You'll no longer be able to sign in with this passkey on the device where it was created. You can always add a new one.
passkey_not_fresh_description: For security, you need to have signed in recently. You can add a passkey later from your account.
passkey_not_fresh_title: Can't add a passkey right now
passkey_reauth_not_fresh_hint: Not confirmed yet — open the link we sent first.
passkey_reauth_prompt_prefix: For security reasons you need to sign in again before adding a passkey. We'll send a sign-in link to
passkey_reauth_sent_suffix: Open it (check your inbox, or the server log for now), come back here and press Add passkey.
passkey_setup_description: Create a passkey and you'll sign in right away with Face ID, Touch ID or a security key next time — without waiting for an email.
search_hint: Type to search by name — typos are fine.
share_assign_description: The share is assigned in its entirety to one owner.
share_error_already_owner: The user already owns the share
share_error_date_not_after_current: The date must be after the current assignment
share_error_user_not_found: The user wasn't found or is deleted
share_history_description: All previous assignments for the share, newest first.
share_manage_description: Assign shares. Each share is owned by one person at a time.
share_unassign_description: Ends the selected assignment from the chosen date onwards. The history is kept.
user_delete_confirm: {name} will no longer be able to sign in. The user is kept in the history.
user_error_already_accepted: The user has already accepted the invitation
user_error_email_taken: A user with this email address already exists
user_error_last_admin: There must be at least one administrator
user_error_target_deleted: The user is deleted and can't be changed
user_field_email_locked_hint: The email address is the sign-in identity and can't be changed. To switch addresses, delete the user and invite them again.
user_invite_description: The user gets an email with a link to get started. They fill in their name and other details themselves.
user_restore_confirm: The user will be able to sign in again via magic link.
user_restore_confirm_named: {name} will be able to sign in again via magic link.
validation_name_too_long: The name is too long (max 255 characters)
validation_phone_too_long: The phone number is too long (max 30 characters)
validation_phone_too_short: The phone number is too short (min 5 characters)
recommendation_error_edit_others: You can only edit your own places.
recommendation_error_delete_others: You can only delete your own places.
recommendation_error_too_many_photos: You can add at most 10 photos.
recommendation_error_duplicate_photos: The same photo can't be added more than once.
recommendation_error_duplicate_tags: The same tag can't be added more than once.
recommendations_empty_description: When someone adds a place, it shows up here on the map.
recommendation_new_description: Share a place you've sailed to — add photos, a spot on the map, and tags.
recommendation_edit_description: Update photos, location, description, and tags.
recommendation_field_description_placeho: Why do you recommend this place?
recommendation_photos_hint: The first photo becomes the cover. Drag to reorder.
recommendation_photo_max: You can add up to 10 photos.
recommendation_location_unset: Tap the map to place the spot.
recommendation_location_hint: Drag the pin to adjust the location.
recommendation_validation_location_requi: Pick a spot on the map.
recommendation_delete_confirm_descriptio: The place will be removed from the map. This can't be undone.
